Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: Victorian formal attire, halved black top hat, underarm holster
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, pale ivory skin, short black hair, deep-set dark brown eyes, wearing a halved black top hat and formal suit with an underarm holster for a bronze-cylindered revolver.
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Claims to have lost recent memories (amnesia)
Klein Moretti.accessories: Cane, newspaper, revolver with wooden handle and bronze cylinder
Klein Moretti.role: Civilian staff at Blackthorn Security Company
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Describes his practice attire and specific weapon details (bronze cylinder, wooden handle).

Thin Intruder.primary_clothing: black tight suit with neat buttons
Thin Intruder.face_description: Ferocious beast-like gaze with deep blue eyes under thick and sharp brown eyebrows.
Thin Intruder.visual_anchor: scrawny male in a black tight suit with neat buttons, deep blue eyes, thick sharp brown eyebrows, extremely agile
Thin Intruder.distinguishing_features: thick and sharp brown eyebrows; agile, feline-like movements
Thin Intruder.source_notes: Visual details (blue eyes, brown brows, tight suit) and faction (Secret Order) confirmed during the encounter.

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions he 'touched his receding black hairline'.

Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: wears a tattered veil cap and carries a self-sewn bag
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage female, pale skin, long wavy black hair, wearing a simple, slightly worn Victorian dress
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions 'brown eyes' and 'shallow dimples'.

Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: black trench coat and a halved black top hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: A mature face with a slightly high hairline and deep, abstruse gray eyes. His expression is often calm, sometimes featuring a polite but unusual smile.
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: late 30s male, fair skin, short dark brown hair with a high receding hairline, deep gray eyes, wearing a black top hat and a knee-length black trench coat, holding a tobacco pipe
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: Enjoys smoking tobacco mixed with mint leaves
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Confirmed his typical Nighthawk attire (trench coat and halved top hat) and gray eyes.

Old Neil.face_description: wrinkles at the edge of his eyes and mouth were deeply recessed
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.source_notes: Rozanne mentions his Sequence 9 title is Mystery Pryer.

Rozanne.primary_clothing: light green Loen-styled dress with beautiful laces on sleeves, collar, and chest
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Seen at the reception desk reading a magazine.

Daly.face_description: Uncanny beauty, adorned with bright blue eyeshadow and prominent blush.
Daly.visual_anchor: mid-20s female, pale skin, twinkling emerald eyes, bright blue eyeshadow and blush, wearing a hooded black robe and an exposed silver bracelet with a white crystal pendant
Daly.color_palette: black, emerald green, cobalt blue, silver
Daly.accessories: silver bracelet with a hanging white crystal pendant, waist pouch containing glass bottles
Daly.source_notes: Identified as a Sequence 7 Spirit Medium.

Roselle Gustav.face_description: handsome and charismatic face with an air of authority
Roselle Gustav.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, elaborate emperor attire, charismatic and authoritative presence
Roselle Gustav.color_palette: imperial red, gold, white, navy blue
Roselle Gustav.source_notes: Historical figure mentioned, visual features guessed based on his status as Emperor/Consul.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Titles: Lady of Crimson, Mother of Concealment, Empress of Misfortune and Horror, Mistress of Repose and Silence. Symbolizes the Red Moon.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Titles and red moon symbolism explicitly stated in the text.

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: Died by repeatedly hitting his head against a wall
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Police confirmed his death by apparent suicide in his house.
